title: GIAB HG002 Baseline Benchmark
summary: Baseline small-variant benchmark for hard metrics using public HG002 truth resources.
usage: compare query VCF output against GIAB truth resources
produce reproducible SNP and indel precision, recall, and F1
publish benchmark-region accounting before public demos

license.name: Public benchmark resources
license.notes: Verify exact upstream terms for each downloaded artifact before redistribution.

sources.name: NIST Genome in a Bottle
sources.notes: Primary source for HG002 benchmark truth resources.

sources.name: GA4GH Variant Benchmarking Tools
sources.notes: Reference guidance for comparable benchmarking practice.

artifacts.name: truth_vcf
artifacts.description: Truth-set VCF for HG002 baseline comparisons.

artifacts.name: benchmark_bed
artifacts.description: Callable benchmark regions used to score the comparison.

artifacts.name: metrics_json
artifacts.description: Machine-readable benchmark outputs for CI and reporting.

artifacts.name: summary_html
artifacts.description: Human-readable benchmark summary for screenshots and docs.

caveats: Treat HG002 as the baseline proof layer, not the only proof layer.
Do not collapse easy-region metrics into claims about difficult medically relevant genes.
